calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jun-07-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Debora Simmons in Propria Persona.

Ms. Simmons stated that she is here to establish fact of birth of her Grandfather (Edward), clarified that Augustino was her Great-Grandfather, stated that Edward is listed as the groom on the marriage license and that there is no birth certificate in San Francisco or Sacramento. Ms. Simmons also stated that the marriage license shows the place of birth as San Francisco, that the World War II registration card shows San Francisco, that the social security card shows San Francisco and that the death certificate shows California. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
